content.problemStatement:
Lets Implement the matrix. 

### Task

- Choose whatever programming language you're comfortable in, and declare a 2D array for a square matrix. 
- Store all the integers from 1 to $N^{\text{2}}$ in it. 
- Print all the the integers from left to right going down in the matrix.
content.inputFormat: - The first line of input will contain a single integer $N$, denoting the no. of rows and columns in square matrix.
content.outputFormat: - Output on a single line, $N^{\text{2}}$ space separated integers from 1 to $N^{\text{th}}$, the elements of the matrix.
